sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103286" key="tetarthmoriai=os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεταρτημορ-ιαῖος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n103286.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">about a quarter</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">quadrant</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.1</biblScope></bibl>, Theo Sm.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.156</biblScope> </bibl> H., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg002:2:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Hyp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
